command: set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p logs/arc4_gpu/arc4_b2_ext9_12/workers; pids=(); for i in 0 1 2 3; do python scripts/arc4_b2_generate.py --generation-manifest results/arc4_quarantine/b2_extension_seeds9_12/generation_manifest.json --out results/arc4_quarantine/b2_extension_seeds9_12 --clips-root /XYFS02/HDD_POOL/paratera_xy/pxy1289/HaocunYe/Research/SoundDecisions/data/FoleyBench/clips --certified results/stage_m_rerun/certified_kernels.json --shard "$i/4" --device "cuda:$i" > "logs/arc4_gpu/arc4_b2_ext9_12/workers/shard${i}.log" 2>&1 & pids+=("$!"); done; rc=0; for p in "${pids[@]}"; do wait "$p" || rc=1; done; test "$rc" -eq 0

placement.rationale: small_16k fits TP1; four independent replicas maximize throughput
